title: Here, O my Lord, I see Thee face to face
firstLine: Here, O my Lord, I see Thee face to face;
publicDomainBasis: Horatius Bonar (1808–1889), James Langran (1835–1909). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Verse 2
Verse 3
Verse 4
Verse 5
Verse 6
sections.text:
Feast after feast thus comes and passes by,
Yet passing, points to the glad feast above,
Giving sweet foretastes of the festal joy,
The Lamb’s great bridal-feast of bliss and love.
